item.title: Things that made me go 'Heh
item.dc:creator: forknihaiek

item.title: So this Rivian survived getting swallowed up by a flood during Helene in North Carolina
item.description:
Rivian R1T survives Hurricane Helene floodwaters Rivian has “spent years” hauling gear, loading bikes, and testing its electric pickup to ensure it can withstand it all. The R1T can plow through 3 feet of water and climb a 100% grade with over 14″ of ground clearance. It even has sports car acceleration with instant torque to hit 0 to 60 mph in as little as 3 seconds. However, after Hurricane Helene left a devastating trail of destruction, Rivian’s electric pickup may have earned its title as the ultimate adventure vehicle. Local Asheville, NC resident and Rivian R1T owner Joshua Vincent Sauer said his Rivian R1T survived the worst of it. After parking his electric pickup by a U-Haul on Thursday night, Sauer returned looking for it on Saturday, only to find it “100 to 150 feet” away by a local Walgreens.
https://electrek.co/2024/10/02/rivian-r1t-dragged-hurricane-helene-still-runs-video/ Amazing when you get an EV developed by competent engineers.
item.dc:creator: BojanglesTheFlyingCar

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
clever
as is tradition
only the finest of restaurants serve chicken nuggets
i dislike that
i absolutely do not know what time it is
kind of difficult
i've had it up to "hear" with this woman
funny creatures
but how was it able to make the sign?
accurate
mmm hmm
as we all should
not sure how that would work but i'm interested
crazy how small we used to be
makes sense
dang
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Alicia Witt holding a pic of herself from 1984’s Dune movie
item.dc:creator: WullieBlake

item.title: A collection in honor of Indigenous Peoples' Day
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/UxYlfKG
"Dignity of Earth and Sky" - A sculpture made in honor of Indigenous women, located in Chamberlain, South Dakota
https://imgur.com/gallery/RNCdKTw
A monument in County Cork, Ireland to the Choctaw tribe - To honor the Natives who in 1847 raised $170 (equivalent to about 5,000 in today's currency) to send to the Irish Great Famine relief. Something the Irish people will never forget
https://imgur.com/gallery/RGkP39Q
Portrait of O-o-be, a Kiowa girl wearing a dress decorated with elk teeth. Her name is embroidered in the textile next to her. Photographed in 1895
https://imgur.com/gallery/P9NWvvf
https://imgur.com/gallery/3zTvTm6
https://imgur.com/gallery/BEzG1u2
Source: https://www.instagram.com/dezbah.rose/
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/uzuriartonline
Words of Affirmation, captured at a local pow wow https://imgur.com/gallery/iEKbVFm
Tribal leaders thanked Gladstone for representing the Blackfeet Nation on the world stage and for being a role model for young people. “Because of you, rez kids on every reservation here and in Canada can chase their dreams,” Councilman Everett Armstrong said at the event. “Students, take a look at this accomplishment — it’s possible.” She was given a stand-up headdress, something that is highly revered in her culture. Worn by men and women, these headdresses (unlike Sioux style ones which sweep backwards) are made from eagle feathers, bison hide, porcupine quills, ermine hides and willows — are considered sacred and symbolic of both the natural and supernatural worlds. “We don’t just give away headdresses,” Siksika Chief Ouray Crowfoot said at the event. “They’re earned.”
Source: https://tulsaworld.com/life-entertainment/local/movies-tv/blackfeet-nation-honors-actress-lily-gladstone-stand-up-headdress-oscar-golden-globe-browning/article_f09a4101-56ff-5386-ab9c-7eef99f62111.html
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gGLNfhtHqWs
After getting lost while looking for the Indes... and landed instead in Hispaniola. Didn't stop him from raping and enslaving and killing the locals he DID find.

And definitely not on a Monday
Every time
I'll stick to crochet
Accurate
100%
Very disappointing
Thank goodness for the snacks
I may have laughed way too hard at this
Damnit
Me too!
I have a black belt in that
Very true
item.dc:creator: IndependentDoodle

item.title: RHM: Update, I’m out of the hospital!
item.description: Figured red head Monday was an appropriate time for this photo with an update (hoping it ok to make an updated post, had more messages than I thought I would) Previous post I was going through the most traumatic hospitalization I’ve been through. I really appreciate the support, funny memes, and cute cat pictures, they really helped me. I ended up being diagnosed with myocarditis with autonomic failure. Hoping I can get back to functioning in life and a mom again I feel like my life is at a standstill. I missed my family so much and ready to be resting at home. And if I could help one person by sharing… If you ever feel like something is seriously wrong, don’t wait, go to the ER!
item.dc:creator: Sevendevils777

item.title: PTGDump: No Theme; All Stolen
item.description:
Hello everyone!
WAAAAAAAUGH!
Every damn day
I do marketing, and this hits hard.
Wishlist item
Am I on the toilet as I curate this? I'll never tell.
Incorrect! Use a drinking glass to separate the fruit from the peel. So much easier, and you get a little bit of mango juice to drink when you're done.
12/10 Pettiness
You either snipped off the top with scissors, or you gnawed off the top with your teeth like a ravening wolf.
Crab indeed in moist shack
I have a friend who is a fireman. I sent him this. He was not amused.
12/10 petty
JASON KELCE IS THE SUPERIOR KELCE BROTHER AND I WILL DIE ON THIS HILL
... and yet I still go to them.
Because they're too slow, they don't follow rules of traffic (stay right when moving forward), and they're always in the way of what I need.
To all the amazing lesbians out there: please be warned.
It's currently pumpkin season, and I am STOKED
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Whoops. This belongs in the "Neurospicy" folder.
Wife and I are making our way through Friday Night Lights again.
99% of the time.
CONSUMMATE V'S
It really does help with sleep and sex stamina. Like, not even joking.
FP Edit: Thanks everyone! Hey, I started one of those YouTube gaming channels, too. Come hang out and mercilessly scrutinize my every move. www.youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

RCT was wild.
SOUND ON
hell yeah
GIRL PLS
The Barbie Movies look cursed
You find him amongst your stuffies. Your blahaj is examining his label.
This is a good insult. It's got all the implication of "get a life" with more intensity.
a
fuck the police
Looks like something out of an 2000s RTS game
oh no
I HAVE SEVERAL QUESTIONS
AAAAAAAA
Nessie, in a smartcar, belting it down the A9: I'M GONNAE FUCKEN EAT YE!

item.title: Why is he allowed to walk around free?

item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

item.title: Grandpa Probably Needs A Checkup
item.description: "Trump is falling concerningly short of any standard of fitness for office and displaying alarming characteristics of declining acuity," the 238 signatories wrote in a letter dated Oct. 13 and first obtained by CBS News. "In the limited opportunities we can examine his behavior, he's providing a deeply concerning snapshot." "As we all age, we lose sharpness and revert to base instincts. We are seeing that from Trump, as he uses his rallies and appearances to ramble, meander, and crudely lash out at his many perceived grievances," the doctors wrote. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-health-records-doctors-for-harris/
item.dc:creator: SOinsanity365

item.title: Dead inside
item.dc:creator: infallibledegenerate

item.title: Memes and things vol 121
item.description:
Seriously. I love it when people remember lil trivia about me
I call Stardew a “just one more thing” game. Sims and Animal Crossing are like this for me.
Let me romance hat mouse!
Nubbin (my cat) has a nub leg in the back so he can’t jump up on things. A few times a week, my partner carries Nubbin around the house to show him places and things he can’t get to.
I have been written up at a job for being too nice. I’m not even kidding.
Fish juice.
I have a chronic illness and I can assure you that it is, in fact, chronic. And painful. So goddamn painful.
Mortal Kombat me.
All hail the glow cloud.
Special delivery! It’s Nubbin!
item.dc:creator: razalude
